ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma separated. Lines beginning with any of these are recognized as todo's.
ast.target: 逗号分隔。以这些字符开头的行将被识别为待办事项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma separated. Sort order for statuses, from high to low.
ast.target: 逗号分隔。状态排序顺序，从高到低。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma separated. Strings for sub-sorting, from high to low.
ast.target: 逗号分隔。用于子排序的字符串，从高到低。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma separated. Add any of these above a list to have this plugin ignore it.
ast.target: 逗号分隔。在列表上方添加这些字符串中的任何一个，插件将忽略该列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval at which the plugin runs, in seconds. Set to 0 to disable automatic sorting.
ast.target: 插件运行的间隔时间，单位为秒。设置为0可禁用自动排序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reorder the active note when switching tabs or focus.
ast.target: 切换标签页或焦点时重新排序活动笔记。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 标签页更改时重新排序
